holdings.infoBox: EGLE is an equity ETF with a total of 374 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 7.62%, Micron Technology at 6.80%, Amazon.com at 6.33%, Cisco Systems at 2.69%, and Berkshire Hathaway at 2.23%.

overview.description: The Global X S&P 500 U.S. Revenue Leaders ETF (EGLE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 U.S. Revenue Leaders index. The fund tracks and index of US companies within the S&P 500, focusing on those generating over 50% of their revenue domestically, using a modified market-cap weighted structure with sector alignment to the S&P 500. EGLE was launched on Apr 15, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
